citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care.
citations.narrative:
At the time of inspection, the consulting veterinarian had committed to providing veterinary care to the facility and
regularly scheduled visits, but the written program of veterinary care was not available for review. In the case of a part-
time attending veterinarian or consulting arrangements, the formal arrangements shall include a written program of
veterinary care and regularly scheduled visits to the research facility in order to ensure adequate veterinary care.
Corrected during inspection on 18 February 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.33(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care. 
At the time of inspection, the consulting veterinarian had committed to providing veterinary care to the facility and 
regularly scheduled visits, but the written program of veterinary care was not available for review. In the case of a part-
time attending veterinarian or consulting arrangements, the formal arrangements shall include a written program of 
veterinary care and regularly scheduled visits to the research facility in order to ensure adequate veterinary care. 
 
Corrected during inspection on 18 February 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
